attributes.action: Make petrol and diesel tax free
attributes.background: Stop taxing petrol and diesel. Freedom of movement is a fundamental human right. We believe the petrol and diesel combustion engine is what fuels our freedom and we shouldn’t be taxed on one of our basic human rights.
